frontmatter.title: aider
frontmatter.description: 开源 terminal 配对编程 agent，git-first + 多 edit format + pluggable LLM。
frontmatter.tier_group: MCP 生态 + 同类工具
frontmatter.notes: subagent v2：主 Claude pre-seed cache（v1 因 subagent 沙箱无网络失败）。Card 含 7 个 takeaway + 6 维 CC 对比 + 3 段教程关联。char_count 2327 超出 methodology×Card 1800 限，标 overflow:true。

cross_check_anchors.verbatim: Aider lets you pair program with LLMs to start a new project or build on your existing codebase.

__all__ = [HelpCoder, AskCoder, Coder, EditBlockCoder, EditBlockFencedCoder, WholeFileCoder, PatchCoder, UnifiedDiffCoder, UnifiedDiffSimpleCoder, ArchitectCoder, EditorEditBlockCoder, EditorWholeFileCoder, EditorDiffFencedCoder, ContextCoder,]
from aider.llm import litellm  # noqa: F401; properly init litellm on launch
Aider has a few different chat modes: code / ask / architect / help

audience_judgment_basis: cs_background=yes 因 Aider 面向写代码工程师；devops=mid 因依赖 git/pipx/uv/Docker 但非 K8s；cc_experience=used 因把 Aider 当作 CC 的对照组——都用过才能做平行评估
fetched_via_log: pre-seeded cache; ls + cat + grep only, no network
exposed_problems: stars / exact PyPI install count 来自 README badge 而非 GitHub API，未能 cross-check
website/docs 路径在 cache 中实际位于 aider/aider/website/docs/ 而非 aider/website/docs/
_validation_issues_at_subagent_return: P23: body 含 HTML entity > 需 unescape
P21: char_count 2327 超 methodology × Card 1800 → overflow:true ✓ 标了
